com.omnex.player.releaseNotes:
- Display tuning 3 kademe sabitlendi: L1/L2/L3 = 1.00/1.15/1.30
- Legacy dahil tum Android APK cihazlarda manual contrast ust limiti 1.30 olarak acildi
- Native video failed Toast kaldirildI

com.omnex.priceview.releaseNotes:
- Branch bazli fiyat sync (ProductPriceResolver)
- Bundle/paket sync endpoint + cihaz sync manager eklendi
- Barkod akisinda bundle fallback eklendi
- Media URL normalize edildi (resim/video)
